content.thinking: Let me look at the chart image first to understand what's shown.

content.text:
Looking at the Q1-2020 column:
- Azure: 59% (highest)
- Server products and cloud svcs: 30% (second highest)
- Windows commercial pdts/cloud svcs: 26%

<think>
In Q1-2020, the values are:
- Azure: 59%
- Server products and cloud svcs: 30%
- Windows commercial pdts/cloud svcs: 26%
- Office 365 commercial: 25%

The second highest is "Server products and cloud svcs" at 30%.
</think>

<answer>
Server products and cloud svcs (30% growth in Q1-2020, second only to Azure's 59%)
</answer>
